heading: Records; annual report
label: 714k Records; annual report
text: The Corporation shall at all times maintain complete and accurate books of account and shall file annually with the Secretary of Agriculture a complete report as to the business of the Corporation, a copy of which shall be forwarded by the Secretary of Agriculture to the President for transmission to the Congress. In addition to the annual report, the Corporation shall submit to Congress on a quarterly basis an itemized report of all expenditures over $10,000 made under section 714c or 714i of this title during the period covered by the report, including expenditures in the form of allotments or fund transfers to other agencies and departments of the Federal Government.
notes: Amendments1996— inserted at end “In addition to the annual report, the Corporation shall submit to Congress on a quarterly basis an itemized report of all expenditures over $10,000 made under section 714c or 714i of this title during the period covered by the report, including expenditures in the form of allotments or fund transfers to other agencies and departments of the Federal Government.”Pub. L. 104–127

Termination of Reporting RequirementsFor termination, effective , of provisions of law requiring submittal to Congress of any annual, semiannual, or other regular periodic report listed in House Document No. 103–7 (in which the requirement, under the 1st sentence of this section, to transmit to Congress a complete annual report as to the business of the Corporation, is listed on page 46), see , as amended, and section 1(a)(4) [div. A, § 1402] of , set out as notes under , Money and Finance.May 15, 2000section 3003 of Pub. L. 104–66Pub. L. 106–554section 1113 of Title 31

Exceptions From Transfer of FunctionsFor exception of functions of corporations of Department of Agriculture from transfer of functions to Secretary of Agriculture by Reorg. Plan No. 2 of 1953, see Exceptions From Transfer of Functions note set out under .section 712a of this title

Delegation of Certain Reporting AuthorityMemorandum of President of the United States, , 69 F.R. 74941, provided:Dec. 8, 2004Memorandum for the Secretary of AgricultureBy the authority vested in me as President by the Constitution and the laws of the United States, including , United States Code, I hereby delegate to you the functions conferred upon the President by section 13 of Public Law 806, 80th Congress (), to provide the specified report to the Congress.section 301 of title 315 U.S.C. 714kYou are authorized and directed to publish this memorandum in the Federal Register.George W. Bush.
